content:
# QA

## Outcome

**Conditionally Approved**

## Evidence

- All three panel invoke helpers (invoke_completer, invoke_panel_member, invoke_final_review_member) correctly return AppResult<InvocationEnvelope> instead of AppResult<Value>, matching the engine.rs primary path pattern at line 4647-4651
- All 7 RecordProducer::Agent construction sites across completion.rs (line 138-141), prompt_review.rs (lines 111-114, 170-173), and final_review.rs (lines 239-242, 351-354, 443-446, 559-562) correctly source backend_family from envelope.metadata.backend_used.family.to_string() and model_id from envelope.metadata.model_used.model_id.clone()
- BackendFamily enum (shared/domain.rs:47) includes Codex variant and implements Display via as_str(), producing lowercase 'codex' — matching the test assertion
- BackendSpec::from_family and ModelSpec::new constructors exist (shared/domain.rs:138, 163), validating the DivergentMetadataAdapter mock construction
- InvocationMetadata struct has backend_used: BackendSpec and model_used: ModelSpec fields, confirming the accessor chain envelope.metadata.backend_used.family and envelope.metadata.model_used.model_id is type-correct
- RecordProducer enum uses #[serde(tag = "type", rename_all = "snake_case")] — test correctly asserts producer["type"] == "agent" and field names backend_family/model_id as snake_case
- Regression test DivergentMetadataAdapter configures Claude targets but returns Codex/actual-model-from-envelope in envelope metadata, then asserts all persisted artifacts carry envelope values (codex, actual-model-from-envelope) — properly validating the fix
- Test asserts checked >= 4, covering reviewer proposals (2), planner position (1), and reviewer votes (2) — all Agent-produced artifact types in the final review panel
- All necessary imports (InvocationEnvelope, RecordProducer) are present in completion.rs, prompt_review.rs, and final_review.rs including the test module

## Findings and Gaps

- COMPILATION NOT VERIFIED: No Rust toolchain available in the environment. All type relationships look correct from manual code inspection (BackendSpec.family: BackendFamily with Display impl, ModelSpec.model_id: String, RecordProducer::Agent { backend_family: String, model_id: String }), but a CI build is required to confirm zero type errors.
- SECONDARY INCONSISTENCY (out of scope but noted): ReviewerProposalRecord at final_review.rs:272-273 still populates backend_family and model_id from member.target (the configured target), not from envelope metadata. These values flow into FinalReviewAmendmentSource (line 136-140) which is used for amendment deduplication/attribution in the aggregate payload — a different concern from the artifact producer metadata. This is cosmetically inconsistent but functionally separate from the bug being fixed.
- Test does not cover completion.rs or prompt_review.rs paths — only final_review.rs. The code changes in those files are structurally identical to the final_review.rs pattern, but they lack dedicated regression test coverage for envelope-vs-target divergence.

## Follow-up and Amendments

- Run cargo check and cargo test in CI to confirm compilation and test pass — this is the blocking condition for full approval
- Consider a follow-up ticket to also source FinalReviewAmendmentSource.backend_family and model_id from envelope metadata at final_review.rs:272-273, for full consistency (low priority, non-blocking)
